articles.title: Escalation in the Strait-U.S.-Iran Tensions Flare Anew
articles.description: Tensions between the U.S. and Iran have surged as both countries engage in military strikes following the downing of a U.S. helicopter. President Trump warned Iran will 'pay the price,' while Iran vowed to reassess diplomatic engagement. The conflict threatens peace talks and impacts oil prices and regional diplomacy.

articles.title: Inflation hits 3-year high, highlighting affordability challenge for Americans
articles.description: Rising gas prices pushed inflation to its highest level in three years last month, a headache for the Federal Reserve and a potential political challenge for the Trump administration as midterm elections near. Consumer prices rose 4.2% in May from a year earlier, the Labor Department said Wednesday, up from 3.8% in April and the third straight increase. On a monthly basis, prices rose 0.5% last month, after big gains of 0.6% in April and 0.9% in March.

articles.title: War impact: Investors turned cautious in May as equity MF inflows hit 1-year low

articles.title: How India uses its forex reserves to defend the rupee when global shocks hit
articles.description: When oil prices surge, foreign investors pull money out, or global markets panic, the RBI often steps into the currency market using India's forex reserves. Here's how those reserves help stabilize the rupee and shield the economy from bigger shocks.
